com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email

Class SmtpAttributes.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.SmtpAttributes.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    SmtpAttributes

    public static class SmtpAttributes.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for creating SmtpAttributes containing SMTP server connection parameters.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Builder(java.lang.String host)
      Constructor to create a new Builder with default attributes: Security Mode = PLAIN SMTP port = 25 Connect timeout = 60 seconds Read timeout = 60 seconds

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SmtpAttributes build()
      Builds SmtpAttributes.
      SmtpAttributes.Builder setConnectTimeout(int connectTimeout)
      Sets the socket connect timeout to wait until connection is closed.
      SmtpAttributes.Builder setPort(int port)
      Sets SMTP port for establishing a connection to SMTP server
      SmtpAttributes.Builder setReadTimeout(int readTimeout)
      Sets the socket read timeout to wait for starting reading a data.
      SmtpAttributes.Builder setServerCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
      Sets the user credentials for authenticating on SMTP server
      SmtpAttributes.Builder setTransportMode(SmtpAttributes.TransportMode transportMode)
      Sets security mode for establishing a connection to SMTP server.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder(java.lang.String host)
        Constructor to create a new Builder with default attributes:
        • Security Mode = PLAIN
        • SMTP port = 25
        • Connect timeout = 60 seconds
        • Read timeout = 60 seconds
        Parameters:
        host - SMTP connection host
        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • setTransportMode

        public SmtpAttributes.Builder setTransportMode(SmtpAttributes.TransportMode transportMode)
        Sets security mode for establishing a connection to SMTP server.
        Parameters:

        Transport - mode for SMTP connection.

        • transportMode value can not be be empty or null and must be from SmtpAttributes.TransportMode values.
        • If security mode is changed to SmtpAttributes.TransportMode.SSL_TLS port must be also switched to SSL port using setPort(int).

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(transportMode) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • setPort

        public SmtpAttributes.Builder setPort(int port)
        Sets SMTP port for establishing a connection to SMTP server
        Parameters:

        SMTP - port value for email.

        • port value can not be be empty or null and must be with in the range: 1 ~ 65535.
        • Default value is 25.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Since:
        API 1

      • setConnectTimeout

        public SmtpAttributes.Builder setConnectTimeout(int connectTimeout)
        Sets the socket connect timeout to wait until connection is closed.
        Parameters:

        Connect - Timeout value in seconds.

        • connectTimeout value can not be be empty or null and must be with in the range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
        • Default value is 60 seconds.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Since:
        API 1

      • setReadTimeout

        public SmtpAttributes.Builder setReadTimeout(int readTimeout)
        Sets the socket read timeout to wait for starting reading a data.
        Parameters:

        Read - Timeout value in seconds.

        • readTimeout value can not be be empty or null and must be with in the range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
        • Default value is 60 seconds.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Since:
        API 1

      • setServerCredentials

        public SmtpAttributes.Builder setServerCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
        Sets the user credentials for authenticating on SMTP server
        Parameters:

        Network - Credentials Attributes user credentials for email.

        • networkCredentialsAttributes value can be be empty or null and must be from NetworkCredentialsAttributes.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(networkCredentialsAttributes) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • build

        public SmtpAttributes build()
                     throws CapabilitiesExceededException

        Builds SmtpAttributes. All of the attributes combine into a SmtpAttributes object.

        Returns:
        a SmtpAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if attributes are out of supported range.
        Since:
        API 1
